release: StockPair v0.6.0 final security and product handoff
packagePurpose: Final hardened local, Vercel frontend, external indexer container, GitHub automation, hostile-data UI, protocol controls and agent handoff candidate.

verification.release: StockPair v0.6.0 final security, UI and deployment handoff

e2e.environmentNote: Ganache emitted an optional native µWS compatibility warning under Node 22 and used its JavaScript fallback. Only completed TAP logs with a nonzero pass count and # fail 0 are counted.

browserVisualCapture.reason: Managed Chromium policy in this execution environment blocked all localhost, private-network, and file URL navigation before the application loaded. Static UI contracts and HTTP delivery passed; no screenshot or browser-console pass is claimed.

notExecuted: live Robinhood Chain target-chain deployment and reorg/RPC-failure tests
GitHub repository push and organization-specific branch/environment protections
Docker image build and image scanning because Docker is unavailable
local Foundry and Slither because their CLIs are unavailable
live responsive screenshot and browser-console capture because managed Chromium blocked local and file navigation
